import 'package:gobl_utils_dart/gobl_utils_dart.dart';

abstract class AccountBase
    extends GoblEntity with GoblSinglePKEntity
    {
      AccountBase({
        Map<String, dynamic> initialData = const {},
        String name,
        String prefix,
        List<String> columns
      })
          : super(
            initialData: initialData,
            name: name,
            prefix: prefix,
            columns: columns
            );
}
